title: スプリングSの後に・いつもと違う想い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Maruzensky appears to have had a
good time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, she seems somewhat gloomy heading to
the press conference.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, I run into Special Week, who was
deeply impacted by watching Maruzensky's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Maruzensky doesn't seem to have the same
energy that she normally does...
